capability: fixed seed reproduces token-for-token across runs

harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-3b

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (qa/capability/smoke.sh, Apple M4): two identical temperature=0.8 seed=42 chat requests returned byte-identical text (llama-3.2-3b -> FROG) — the per-step SplitMix64 RNG reproduces token-for-token on the Metal backend. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_smoke_out/llama-3.2-3b/seed_a.json, seed_b.json.
